hooks.command: root="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null)}"; [ -n "$root" ] || root="."; f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); [ -n "$f" ] || exit 0; f="${f//\\//}"; root="${root//\\//}"; case "$f" in "$root"/infrastructure/*|infrastructure/*) ;; *) exit 0 ;; esac; cd "$root/infrastructure" || exit 2; terraform fmt -check -recursive 1>&2 || exit 2; terraform validate 1>&2 || exit 2

cd "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null)}" 2>/dev/null; out=$(make lint 2>&1); rc=$?; if [ $rc -ne 0 ]; then printf '%s' "$out" | jq -Rs --arg rc "$rc" '{decision:"block",reason:("Phase 0 exit criteria failed (make lint exit=" + $rc + "). Fix lint errors before finishing turn:\n\n" + .)}'; fi; exit 0
